caption: 新人又叠歪了。
scene: Andy standing inside the boutique beside a low display table holding up a single folded scarf with one corner sticking out crooked, a tiny new SA figure standing slightly behind him looking sheepish, the headset line on Andy's ear, his mouth a patient flat line.
bible_hook: §2 Andy manages a team of 6 SAs now — the new hire who keeps mis-folding the scarves
rationale: Pulls Andy's newer management-half pressure (training, not selling) which hasn't appeared yet this month; recent Andy posts were inventory/target/commute/AirPod, none about his team or the new hire.
